rulings.Case Title: KEVIN SINCLAIR ET AL VS. JIAN MING CHEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Joinder In Motions For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday April 12, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF KEVIN SINCLAIR, YOUNGHEE SINCLAIR Plaintiffs Joinder In Motions For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement DENIED. Moving party failed to establish that the settlement is in the reasonable range/within the ballpark of the settling party's liability for plaintiff's injuries. Defendant Lum is settling 6 causes of action including fraud for $20,000 (and an unspecified amount for services), where the value of the case per Plaintiff is around $1.1M. Defendants Chen are settling 6 causes of action including fraud for a payment of $905,500 for the property worth $880,000, i.e. overpayment of $27,500, where the value of the case per Plaintiff is around $1.1M. This leaves the non-settling Defendant, according to Plaintiff's calculation with $172,000 liability on 2 causes of action, i.e. about 6-8 times more than the amounts to be paid by the settling defendants. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ZORIALL, LLC VS. DALE RICHARD DUNCAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Statutory Attorney'S Fee And Costs Of Opposing Defendants' Frivolous Special Motion To Strike Complaint For Unlawful Detainer
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday April 12, 2016, line 5. PLAINTIFF ZORIALL, LLC Motion For Statutory Attorney'S Fee And Costs Of Opposing Defendants' Frivolous Special Motion To Strike Complaint For Unlawful Detainer DENIED. Defendant's motion is not frivolous and is not solely intended to cause unnecessary delay. By no later than April 12, 2016 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff's counsel to provide proof of timely compliance with November 30, 2015 order re: CCP 473(c). Late-filed reply is stricken. = (501/REQ)
